case_title: MERRICK BANK CORPORATION VS. OTTO R CARDONA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $284.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100029960) AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, OTTO R
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MERRICK BANK CORPORATION

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERRICK BANK CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, OTTO R SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2017

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERRICK BANK CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDONA, OTTO R $6,590.48 PRINCIPAL, $284.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,874.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100029960)
